app.title: Open Personality
app.subtitle: Big Five Personality
home.speed_help: 30-question quick assessment, can pause and resume, optionally continue for refinement after completion
home.standard_help: 120-question standard assessment, can pause and resume, optionally continue for refinement after completion
home.advanced_help: 300-question comprehensive assessment, can pause and resume
home.share_code_placeholder: Enter share code to view report
home.resume_cloud: Enter share code to restore progress
home.why_big_body_1: The Big Five is one of the most widely accepted personality models in psychology, describing behavior, thinking patterns, and emotional tendencies across five core dimensions.
home.why_big_body_2: Unlike traditional binary personality types, the Big Five places everyone on a continuous spectrum across each dimension, producing a unique and nuanced profile grounded in decades of statistical research.
questionnaire.confirm_body: Are you sure you want to submit? You cannot change your answers after submission.
questionnaire.summary_desc: Review your answers — tap to modify
questionnaire.hint: No right or wrong answers — go with your first instinct, you can always go back
report.title: Your Personality Profile
report.mbti_help_body: This system maps Big Five scores to MBTI dimensions (E/I, S/N, T/F, J/P) using a weighted algorithm. Each MBTI pair is calculated from multiple Big Five domains and facets, calibrated via Sigmoid to output probabilities (e.g., E(73%) / I(27%)) rather than binary labels. The Big Five provides continuous spectrum data as the primary model, with MBTI as a supplementary reference.
report.partial_note: Continue answering for a more accurate personality profile
report.not_found_desc: This share code is invalid or the report has expired.
report.friend_prompt: You haven't taken the test! See how you compare with your friend
compare.title: Personality Comparison
compare.subtitle: Your personality differences
compare.error: Failed to load comparison data. Please check the share codes.
compare.same_person: This is the same person, cannot compare.
error.422: Invalid submission data. Please check and try again.
error.500: Internal server error. Please try again later.
